action.content: Expression: The grid containing five rows of five cells each, where every row features only the fourth cell (columns 4) as solid cell ("X"), with all other cells in every row being empty ("â–˘"). In contrast, the first distractor grid has a single solid cell in each row but varied column positions, and the second distractor grid has no solid cells.
